items.name: CherryMX Black / ABS
items.summary: Heavier linear sprite cut with a firmer attack and less low-end weight than the PBT black variant.

items.name: CherryMX Black / PBT
items.summary: Heavier linear sprite cut with subdued brightness and more low-end body.

items.name: CherryMX Blue / ABS
items.summary: Bright click-jacket slice from the original Mechvibes sprite bundle.

items.name: CherryMX Blue / PBT
items.summary: Click-jacket sprite cut with a denser body than the ABS blue variant.

items.name: CherryMX Brown / ABS
items.summary: A light tactile slice with a modest top-out and little extra ring.

items.name: CherryMX Brown / PBT
items.summary: Tactile sprite cut with a denser body and calmer top-end than the ABS brown variant.

items.name: CherryMX Red / ABS
items.summary: Lighter linear sprite cut with a cleaner, brighter attack than the PBT red variant.

items.name: CherryMX Red / PBT
items.summary: A lighter linear sprite cut with more brightness than depth.

items.name: EG Crystal Purple
items.summary: Sharper tactile sprite cut with a brighter edge than the EG Oreo pack.

items.name: EG Oreo
items.summary: Sharper tactile sprite cut with a crisp top-out and less low-end bloom.

items.name: Full Creamy Goodness
items.summary: The deepest Mechvibes full-travel option in this local set, with restrained top-end.

items.name: Holy Pandas
items.summary: Dense tactile pack with stronger body and a pack-specific MIT notice preserved in-repo.

items.name: MX Black / Full Travel
items.summary: Heavier full-travel linear set with more body than top-end brightness.

items.name: MX Blue / Full Travel
items.summary: Overt full-travel click pack with light press variation and a clear top-out.

items.name: MX Brown / Full Travel
items.summary: Balanced tactile full-travel set with modest press variation and a neutral release.

items.name: NK Cream
items.summary: Representative single-button mapping built from the vendored NK Cream per-key WAV pack.

items.name: Topre Purple Hybrid / PBT
items.summary: Rounded tactile slice with deeper body and restrained brightness.

items.name: Turquoise / Full Travel
items.summary: A sharper hybrid option that can read tactile or click-adjacent depending on the switch profile.

items.name: Bucklespring Backspace Pair
items.summary: Single-button bucklespring mapping for upstream keycode 0x0E (Backspace), kept separate inside the GPL bundle.

items.name: Bucklespring Canonical Pair
items.summary: Canonical single-button bucklespring mapping using the upstream 0x31 fallback press and release pair.

items.summary: Single-button bucklespring mapping for upstream keycode 0x3A (Caps Lock), kept separate inside the GPL bundle.
